message:
feat(tools,security): expand content hash coverage and enrichment logic across 13 modules

- Expand fault classification and gate logic (+56/-16 lines)

Challenge flow (challenge_flow.rs):

- adversarial_resilience_metrics: expand metric surface (+28/-8)
- compatibility_correctness_metrics: expand hash coverage (+62/-12)
- enterprise_governance: refine governance logic (+31/-12)
- migration_speed_failure_metrics: expand metric surface (+38/-9)
- migration_validation_cohorts: add cohort tracking (+42/-2)
- partner_lighthouse_programs: expand program tracking (+31/-2)
- performance_hardening_metrics: expand hash coverage (+57/-10)
- replay_determinism_metrics: expand metric surface (+37/-10)
- safe_extension_onboarding: expand onboarding logic (+67/-2)
- trust_economics_dashboard: expand dashboard metrics (+40/-6)
- version_benchmark_standards: refine benchmark logic (+66/-23)

Beads tracker: sync issue state
